title: context_highlight SSE Event
description: Instructs the source pane to visually highlight one or more text ranges in a document. Used for citation callouts, conflict highlighting, and relevance indicators.

documentId.description: ID of the document whose source pane should receive the highlights.

highlights.description: One or more text ranges to highlight. All ranges apply to the same document.

highlightType.description: Visual style to apply: 'relevant' (soft blue), 'cited' (gold underline), 'conflicting' (red strikethrough).

reason.description: Human-readable explanation shown in the highlight tooltip.
